post.summary: Creates new video entity and return TUS url for uploading

403.description: User has no permission to upload videos

get.summary: Return video player url by video id

id.description:
Id of the created video entity. Store this (e.g. on a lecture) to
reference the video later; it becomes playable once the upload to `url`
finishes and Yandex transcodes it.

url.description: TUS (resumable) upload URL the client should upload the file bytes to.

Gradebook.description: Full exam gradebook: metadata, per-attempt rows and summary stats.

GradebookRow.description: One learner attempt in an exam gradebook.

GradebookSummary.description: Aggregate statistics across all attempts of an exam.

LectureResponseDTO.description:
Full lecture view, including the rich-text body and completion state.

The `video_id`, when present, is resolved to a playable URL through the
existing `GET /video/{video_id}` endpoint.

LectureSummaryDTO.description: Lighter lecture view used when listing the lectures of a topic.

PracticeAdminDTO.description: Teacher/editing view of a practice: metadata plus full tasks (with answers).

PracticeDetailDTO.description: Full learner view of a practice: metadata plus its ordered tasks.

PracticeSubmitResultDTO.description: Result of a single practice submission.

PracticeSummaryDTO.description: A practice as shown in a topic list, with the caller's aggregate progress.

PracticeTaskDTO.description:
A practice task as shown to a learner: the public task (no answers) plus the
caller's own progress.
